name: wsg-check
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'set -e; marker="$HOME/.dotfiles.installed"; if [ -f "$marker" ]; then exit 0; fi; rm -rf "$HOME/.dotfiles"; git clone --depth=1 --branch "$DOTFILES_REF" "$DOTFILES_REPO" "$HOME/.dotfiles"; if [ -x "$HOME/.dotfiles/install.sh" ]; then "$HOME/.dotfiles/install.sh"; elif [ -f "$HOME/.dotfiles/install.sh" ]; then bash "$HOME/.dotfiles/install.sh"; fi; touch "$marker"'
